name: Settings - Surcharges
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/257-settings-surcharges#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "FAQs and related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Some payment methods may incur a cost to the business, for example credit card facilities. In these instances, a surcharge may be imposed to the customer to offset the cost of the payment."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Surcharges can be created in Retail Express as either a percentage or set value (dollar amount)  and activated against a Payment Type used within the POS."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Competition and Consumer Amendment (Payment Surcharges) Act 2016 ", "italic": true}, {"text": "bans businesses from charging excessive payment surcharges on credit, debit and prepaid card payments. For more information refer to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.accc.gov.au/consumers/prices-surcharges-receipts/credit-debit-prepaid-card-surcharges", "children": [{"text": "ACCC website"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphtoEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphtoEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_surcharges (1).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Using Surcharges"}], "data-id": "using-surcharges"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To implement the Surcharges feature you will need to create the Surcharge first, then assign it to your individual payment methods in POS. Surcharges can be activated and deactivated as required, and various reports within Retail Express have dedicated Surcharge sections to report on the amounts that have been charged."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Users must have access to the Surcharge functionality to be able to access the Surcharge settings. Refer to the "}, {"text": "Users - Profile Security"}, {"text": " article for more information."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/257-settings-surcharges#surcharge-create", "children": [{"text": "Create a Surcharge"}]}], "data-id": "create-a-surcharge"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a surcharge:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into Retail Express"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Surcharges", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Type in an "}, {"text": "Amount ", "bold": true}, {"text": "e.g. 1"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "unit ", "bold": true}, {"text": "by clicking either the $ symbol or % symbol to highlight the unit"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The surcharge total will be calculated using the value entered and the unit e.g. 1 with the % highlighted will be calculated as 1% of the payment value; 1 with a $ highlighted being a $1 surcharge total fee."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Create", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Continue to the "}, {"text": "Activate a Surcharge ", "bold": true}, {"text": "section to enable the Surcharge for a Payment Type"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "editing-deleting-a-surcharge"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To edit or delete a surcharge:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Surcharge", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The list of surcharges will be displayed at the bottom"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Pencil", "bold": true}, {"text": " icon to edit the surcharge"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Amend the "}, {"text": "Name ", "bold": true}, {"text": "or "}, {"text": "Value", "bold": true}, {"text": " as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Tick ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button to save the changes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Trash Can ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon to delete the surcharge altogether"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If a surcharge is currently activated against a Payment Type (even if the Payment Type is not enabled) or there are historical orders with the Surcharge, the Surcharge cannot be deleted."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphttEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphttEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "surcharges_editsurcharge.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/257-settings-surcharges#", "children": [{"text": "Activate/deactivate a Surcharge"}]}], "data-id": "activate-deactivate-a-surcharge"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once a Surcharge has been created it will need to be activated against a Payment Type before it can be used in POS. To activate a surcharge:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > POS Settings > Payment Surcharges", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a "}, {"text": "Payment Type", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a "}, {"text": "Default Surcharge", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Activate", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you use the "}, {"text": "Tyro ", "bold": true}, {"text": "or "}, {"text": "PC-EFTPOS ", "bold": true}, {"text": "integration and require a surcharge against a credit card, you will need to activate the Surcharge against the Tyro or PC-EFTPOS Payment Type. This will prompt the Surcharge confirmation window prior to processing the payment."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update as of February 2020 - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "PC-EFTPOS has been renamed to Linkly but is still currently referred to as PC-EFTPOS within the Retail Express application."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphtyEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphtyEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "surcharges_activatepaymentsurcharge.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/257-settings-surcharges#", "children": [{"text": "To Edit/deactivate a Surcharge"}]}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Pencil ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon to edit the settings (change a Payment Type or Default Surcharge)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make the selection as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Tick ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button to save the changes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Trash Can ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon to remove a Surcharge from the Activation list"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If a Surcharge is deleted from the Activation list the Surcharge will still exist in the system (it just hasn't been activated). You will need to navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Surcharge ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to delete the Surcharge from the Surcharges list"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphu3EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphu3EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "surcharges_editactivatedsurcharge.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Press "}, {"text": "OK ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to the message"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log out of POS", "bold": true}, {"text": " and back in again to refresh the changes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/257-settings-surcharges#surcharge-pos", "children": [{"text": "Adding a Surcharge to a sale"}]}], "data-id": "adding-a-surcharge-to-a-sale"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Surcharges are applied when entering a payment for the order on the Payments tab of POS. To add a surcharge to the sale:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a sale as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Payment ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add a payment to the sale"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "POS - Enter Payments against Sales"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Add Surcharge ", "bold": true}, {"text": "window will be displayed with the default Surcharge highlighted"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphu8EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If the window doesn't display you may not have activated the Surcharge, or allocated it against the wrong Payment Type e.g. payments using the integrated Tyro or PC-EFTPOS will need to have surcharges allocated to Tyro or PC-EFTPOS, not individual cards e.g. Visa."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Surcharge activated against the Payment Type will be selected by default, to select a different Surcharge click on the required option or click None to remove the Surcharge altogether"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The new "}, {"text": "Payment Total ", "bold": true}, {"text": "including the selected Surcharge option is displayed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Continue ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to accept the updated total, or click "}, {"text": "Cancel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to cancel the payment and surcharge and return to the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If an integrated payment method has been selected follow the remaining prompts to process the payment"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The payment amount and order totals will be recalculated to include the value of the Surcharge (or no change if None was selected)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": Once created the Surcharge line will be displayed on the sales documents, regardless of whether there is a surcharge for the current order."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "In order to display Surcharges on the Receipts you will need to update the Hardware Utility.
